chapter_title.en: The Reward of Helping a Believer, Relieving Him of Distress And Showing Him Kindness

text: 121 - وعن الصادق عليه السلام: من فرج عن أخيه المسلم كربة فرج الله عنه كربة يوم القيامة، ويخرج من قبره مثلوج الصدر

en.muhajir-b-ali: 121. It has been related that al-Sadiq (a.s) said: One who relieves a distress from his Muslim brother, Allah will remove a distress from him on the Day of Resurrection and he shall come forth from his grave delighted.
